DCR-based Log Ingestion API now provides similar capabilities with added flexibility of data transformation and support of secure authentication methods....
articles.author: Microsoft

articles.title: Transition to using standard tests for single-step availability testing in Azure Monitor application insights by 30 September 2026
articles.summary: URL ping tests in the application insights feature will be retired on 30 September 2026. [Sevice: Azure Monitor, Target Date: 30 Sep 2026, Target Period: Q3 2026]
articles.author: Microsoft
